description: Self-hosted multi-agent AI platform (FastAPI + LangGraph + ChromaDB + PGLite). Gap analysis vs SPEC.md (v0.1.0, 2026-05-13). 14 issues created across 3 phases.

architecture_decisions.decision: LangGraph supervisor pattern with role-specialized agents
architecture_decisions.rationale: SPEC.md 2.1 - supervisor routes by classify_task_type keyword rules

architecture_decisions.decision: ChromaDB + PGLite as separate stores with SharedMemoryStore facade
architecture_decisions.rationale: SPEC.md 2.2 - PGLite has no vector type; ChromaDB handles semantic, PGLite handles episodic/style

tasks.title: Wire LangGraph SqliteSaver checkpointer + write checkpointer test
tasks.description: Add langgraph-checkpoint-sqlite to pyproject.toml deps. Fix build_supervisor_graph() SqliteSaver wiring (both import-success and import-failure paths must try SqliteSaver). Write test_langgraph_checkpointer_resume.
acceptance_criteria: langgraph-checkpoint-sqlite>=0.1.0 in backend/pyproject.toml
SqliteSaver used when checkpointer_path provided (not MemorySaver fallback)
test_langgraph_checkpointer_resume passes
Phase 1 exit criterion: task can be restarted mid-execution and resume from checkpoint

tasks.title: Implement trigger_skill() three-stage chain + skill registry startup load
tasks.description: Implement backend/skills/trigger.py with trigger_skill(task_description) using: explicit name match -> keyword match -> LLM intent classifier. Add SkillRegistry.load_all() call in main.py lifespan. Write test_skill_trigger_chain.
acceptance_criteria: trigger_skill() implements explicit > keyword > intent priority chain
classify_intent() LLM call when keyword path misses
SkillRegistry.load_all() called in main.py lifespan startup
test_skill_trigger_chain passes with explicit, keyword, and intent triggers

tasks.title: Wire skill executor into SupervisorRunner + draft-approve-continue flow
tasks.description: Implement SupervisorRunner.run_with_skill() delegating to execute_skill() (DAG) instead of direct _run_agent(). When task matches skill trigger, route to skill executor. execute_skill() returns SkillResult(status=draft) at approval gate. POST /approve resumes via execute_skill_continue().
acceptance_criteria: SupervisorRunner.run_with_skill() implemented and callable
Task matching skill trigger delegates to execute_skill() not direct agent
execute_skill() returns status=draft at approval gate -> task enters draft state
POST /api/tasks/{id}/approve resumes DAG via execute_skill_continue()
test_skill_draft_approval_flow end-to-end: task -> skill DAG -> draft -> approve -> completed

tasks.title: Implement clarification protocol (WS messages + API endpoint)
tasks.description: Add POST /api/tasks/{task_id}/clarification endpoint accepting {decision, edited_draft}. Wire ws_manager.send_clarification_request() in supervisor when agent encounters ambiguous input. Clarification response populates context.constraint so agent continues.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/tasks/{task_id}/clarification endpoint implemented
Agent encounters ambiguity -> send_clarification_request() with question/options/context_summary
Clarification response injected into task context for continuation
test_clarification_flow: task -> clarification_request WS -> user responds -> task continues

tasks.title: Implement per-integration rate limiter (asyncio.Semaphore)
tasks.description: Create backend/tools/rate_limiter.py with IntegrationRateLimiter class using per-key Semaphore dict per SPEC 5.5.2. Wrap all tool calls via integration_call(integration_name, fn). GitHub=Semaphore(5), Stripe=Semaphore(2), gmail=Semaphore(10), linear=Semaphore(5), _default=Semaphore(20).
acceptance_criteria: IntegrationRateLimiter with per-integration semaphores as specified
All tool calls routed through integration_call(integration_name, fn)
Concurrent calls to same integration serialized; different integrations parallel
test_concurrent_rate_limiting: 6 concurrent GitHub calls -> 5 pass immediately, 1 queued

tasks.title: Implement writing style learning (LLM extraction on draft approval)
tasks.description: On task approval, call LLM to extract WritingProfile fields from approved content: tone, sentence_length, first_person, signature_phrases, greeting_style, signoff_style. Feed extracted fields to memory.update_writing_style(). If user edited draft, extract from edited version. Write test.
acceptance_criteria: On task approval, extract style fields via LLM from approved content
Feed extracted fields to memory.update_writing_style(extracted)
If user edited draft, extract from edited version (not original)
test_style_learning_pipeline: mock LLM, verify WritingProfile updated after approve

tasks.title: Add UserPreference API (GET/PUT /api/preferences) + onboarding endpoint
tasks.description: Implement GET /api/preferences (return UserPreference singleton with defaults) and PUT /api/preferences (partial update). Implement POST /api/onboarding to create WritingProfile and Integration credentials from OnboardingWizard step 3 submission.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/preferences returns current user preferences with defaults
PUT /api/preferences accepts partial update (only changed fields)
POST /api/onboarding accepts {writing_style, integrations} and creates records
OnboardingWizard FE calls POST /api/onboarding on step 3 completion

tasks.title: Wire SkillLauncher to GET /api/skills catalog + run endpoint
tasks.description: Expose SkillRegistry.list() via GET /api/skills (SkillMetadata list) and GET /api/skills/{id} (full Skill with execution_graph). Add POST /api/skills/{id}/run to trigger skill execution. Wire SkillLauncher.tsx to TanStack Query to fetch and display skills with success/failure counts.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/skills and GET /api/skills/{id} return correct schema
SkillLauncher displays all loaded skills with success/failure counts
Click on skill calls POST /api/skills/{id}/run -> task created -> WS updates UI
test_skill_launcher_api verifying catalog endpoint response shape

tasks.title: Wire all WebSocket messages at correct task state transitions
tasks.description: send_task_status_update on pending->running->draft transitions. send_draft_ready when skill hits approval gate. send_approval_resolved on POST /approve and POST /reject. send_task_completed on success with final_output. Verify NotificationBell receives and displays real counts from WS.
acceptance_criteria: All 8 WS message types (SPEC 2.5) sent at correct state transitions
NotificationBell receives and displays real notification counts from WS
test_websocket_messages verifies all 8 message types fire at correct times

tasks.title: Add Temporal service to compose.yaml + implement actual workflows
tasks.description: Add temporal service to compose.yaml (temporalio/server:1.24.0 or later) with PostgreSQL persistence. Implement email monitor workflow (IMAP fetch + urgency classification) and follow-up detection workflow (3-day unreplied check). Replace TemporalClient stub logging with temporalio.WorkflowClient.start().
acceptance_criteria: docker compose up -d temporal starts Temporal server with persistence
Email inbox monitoring workflow running (periodic IMAP fetch)
Follow-up detection workflow running (unreplied thread check)
test_temporal_workflow_startup verifies workflow clients initialize without error

tasks.title: Implement LinearTool (Phase 1 per SPEC 5.1)
tasks.description: Create backend/tools/integrations/linear.py implementing BaseTool with list_issues(), create_issue(), update_issue(), get_issue() using Linear API v1. Register via register_all_tools(). Use integration_call(linear, ...) for rate limiting. Phase 1 uses personal API token (not OAuth).
acceptance_criteria: LinearTool with list_issues(), create_issue(), update_issue(), get_issue()
Tool registered via register_all_tools()
Rate limited via integration_call(linear, ...)
test_linear_tool with mocked Linear API responses

tasks.title: Add GET /api/usage budget endpoint + WS budget alerts
tasks.description: Expose BUDGET_GUARD.usage_today via GET /api/usage (calls_today, tokens_today, calls_remaining, tokens_remaining). Enhance GET /health to include budget warnings when calls_remaining < 50 or tokens_remaining < 300k. Send budget_warning WS message to dashboard when threshold approached.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/usage returns current day budget usage
Dashboard can display Approaching OpenRouter limit banner
Budget alert sent via WS when remaining < threshold
test_budget_api verifying usage endpoint response

tasks.title: Implement Stripe webhook handler with HMAC verification
tasks.description: Add POST /webhooks/stripe endpoint with HMAC-SHA256 signature validation using STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET. Implement billing anomaly detection: if invoice.paid_amount > billing_alert_threshold_usd -> draft notification for user approval. Webhook processing logged to episodic memory.
acceptance_criteria: POST /webhooks/stripe validates signature, returns 200 fast (within 3s)
test_stripe_webhook_validation with known-good and tampered signatures
Billing anomaly triggers draft-first workflow (approval required)
Webhook processing logged to episodic memory

tasks.title: Add pagination and date filtering to GitHubTool.get_commits()
tasks.description: Fix GitHubTool.get_commits() to paginate through all pages (per_page=100, page loop) and filter by since=YYYY-MM-DD date parameter. Handle X-RateLimit-Remaining headers; on 403 wait for rate limit reset via integration_call semaphore.
acceptance_criteria: get_commits(since: datetime) paginates through all pages until since date reached
test_github_pagination with mocked paged responses (3 pages)
Rate limit headers checked; 403 triggers semaphore wait

testing_strategy.unit_tests: Circuit breaker, classify_task_type, fernet_round_trip, safe_yaml_loading, skill_graph_validation - all passing
testing_strategy.integration_tests: Empty dir (backend/tests/integration/) - 14 integration test modules needed
testing_strategy.e2e_tests: Draft approval flow, checkpointer resume, WS message protocol - needed
testing_strategy.performance_tests: Budget guard rate limits, per-integration concurrency
